rules.advice_if_low: Your sleep is below the ideal 8 hours. Prioritizing more sleep is a highly effective way to reduce stress.
rules.advice_if_high: Excellent work! You are getting the ideal amount of sleep, which is crucial for managing stress.

rules.advice_if_low: You have a healthy balance with your device usage. Keeping screen time low is great for your mental well-being.
rules.advice_if_high: Your daily screen time is higher than the optimal 2.5 hours. Consider setting usage timers or finding offline hobbies to help lower digital-related stress.

rules.advice_if_low: You manage your notifications very well. Keeping them low helps maintain focus and reduces constant digital interruptions.
rules.advice_if_high: Your daily notifications are high. Try using 'Do Not Disturb' mode or batch-checking alerts to regain control and lower stress.

rules.advice_if_low: You have great discipline with your phone usage, unlocking it fewer times than the typical user. This is a healthy habit!
rules.advice_if_high: You unlock your phone frequently. This can be a sign of distraction. Being more mindful about when you check your phone can help improve focus.

rules.advice_if_low: Your sleep quality is not at its best. Improving it by creating a relaxing bedtime routine could significantly lower your stress.
rules.advice_if_high: You're getting high-quality sleep, which is fantastic! This is one of the best things you can do for your mental and physical health.
